# GitHub Copilot — movie-finder-docs

Documentation site and architecture artefacts for Movie Finder. Contains MkDocs pages,
PlantUML diagrams, Structurizr C4 model, and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).

Parent project: `aharbii/movie-finder` — all issues created there first, then linked here.

---

## Repo structure

| Path                              | Content                                                                        |
| --------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `docs/`                           | MkDocs source pages (Markdown)                                                 |
| `docs/architecture/plantuml/`     | Canonical PlantUML diagrams (`.puml`)                                          |
| `docs/architecture/workspace.dsl` | Structurizr C4 model (L1–L3 + deployment)                                      |
| `docs/architecture/decisions/`    | Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)                                           |
| `mkdocs.yml`                      | MkDocs configuration                                                           |
| `scripts/prepare-docs.sh`         | Copies submodule READMEs, renders PNGs — called automatically by `make mkdocs` |

---

## PlantUML diagrams (canonical architecture)

Always update the `.puml` file for any architectural change. **Never generate `.mdj` StarUML files.**

| File                              | Content                                |
| --------------------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| `01-domain-model.puml`            | Core domain entities                   |
| `02-system-architecture.puml`     | High-level system overview             |
| `03-backend-architecture.puml`    | Backend internal structure             |
| `04-langgraph-pipeline.puml`      | LangGraph 8-node pipeline              |
| `05-langgraph-statemachine.puml`  | State machine transitions              |
| `06-frontend-architecture.puml`   | Angular component architecture         |
| `07-seq-authentication.puml`      | Auth sequence (login, refresh, revoke) |
| `08-seq-chat-sse.puml`            | Chat SSE streaming sequence            |
| `09-seq-langgraph-execution.puml` | Full pipeline execution sequence       |
| `10-deployment-azure.puml`        | Azure deployment topology              |

Render locally: `plantuml -png docs/architecture/plantuml/*.puml`
PNGs are gitignored — generated at build time by `scripts/prepare-docs.sh`.

---

## Structurizr C4 model

`docs/architecture/workspace.dsl` — defines L1–L3 views and deployment diagram.
`workspace.json` is gitignored (regenerated by Structurizr Lite).

View locally:

```bash
docker compose --profile docs up structurizr   # → http://localhost:18080
```

Update `workspace.dsl` whenever components, containers, or inter-system relations change.

---

## Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

Location: `docs/architecture/decisions/`
Template and index: `docs/architecture/decisions/index.md`

**When to write an ADR:**

- Tech stack or external dependency change
- New design pattern introduced project-wide
- Security or auth model change
- Significant API contract decision

Status lifecycle: `Proposed` → `Accepted` / `Superseded` / `Deprecated`

---

## MkDocs

```bash
# From repo root — runs prepare-docs.sh and PlantUML rendering automatically
make mkdocs   # → http://localhost:8001
```

---

## Workflow invariants

- This repo is the gitlink path `docs` inside `aharbii/movie-finder`. Parent workflow/path
  filters must use `docs`, not `docs/**`.
- Cross-repo tracker issues originate in `aharbii/movie-finder`. Create the linked child issue in
  this repo only if this repo will actually change.
- Inspect `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/*.yml`, `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` when present, and a
  recent example before creating or editing issues/PRs. Do not improvise titles or bodies.
- For child issues in this repo, use `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/linked_task.yml` and keep the
  description, file references, and acceptance criteria repo-specific.
- If CI, required checks, or merge policy changes affect this repo, update contributor-facing docs
  here and in `aharbii/movie-finder` where relevant.
- If a new standalone issue appears mid-session, branch from `main` unless stacking is explicitly
  requested.
- PR descriptions must disclose the AI authoring tool + model. Any AI-assisted review comment or
  approval must also disclose the review tool + model.

---

## Cross-cutting — check for every change

1. GitHub issue in `aharbii/movie-finder` + linked child issue here only if this repo changes, using the current templates and recent examples
2. Branch: `docs/` prefix for documentation-only changes (kebab-case) from `main` unless stacking is explicitly requested
3. Changes committed here first, then submodule pointer bumped in parent repo
4. PlantUML source (`.puml`) is the canonical form — PNGs are generated, never committed
5. `workspace.dsl` updated for any component or container-level architecture change
6. ADR written for any tech decision future developers would ask "why did they do this?"
